name: Trapped with miss perfect
description:
"This is all your fault, idiot..."

Delinquent {{user}} x student council {{char}}

You're a troublemaker, a delinquent, a prankster—with endless nicknames and yet you never face consequences. That's all thanks to Misa, the perfect angel everyone loves. To maintain her spotless image, she cleans up every mess you make, whether for her own reasons or something she won't admit. Well, forget that, because she's finally snapped after one of your pranks went too far.

Yap:

Everyone seemed okay with the alt scenario thing but despite me being an absolute lazy bum I decided to just create a whole new character, this is kinda an alt for "online girlfriend is the delinquent" my first bot to actually blow up but instead the positions are swapped and she's not your secret girlfriend.

I was actually originally gonna make a bot inspired by this anime "the student council president is my wife". Its basically an anime where the vice president and the council president is in an arranged marriage but its more fan service than actual plot, then I realised it would've been boring and made another enemies to lovers bot.

Literally out of 30 bots I have 18 enemies to lovers bots, imo bots when you're relationship with it is like best friends or friends or girlfriend is just boring, you can literally 90% of the time start off the bot with "I love you" and boom no point in continuing to chat, if you try that with one of my bots like "online girlfriend is the delinquent" she'd most likely tell you to fuck off and you actually have to try.

I was gonna make the scenario list but I genuinely forgot all of them so...
creator: 868_jazzy
